description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth white icing base and elaborate floral decorations around the top edge. The flowers are piped in shades of white, pink, magenta, and purple, creating a vibrant and festive appearance. The cake's sides are finished with horizontal ridges and a pink ruffled border at the base, adding texture and visual interest. The top surface is mostly flat and open, with the floral decorations forming a ring around the perimeter, leaving the center plain. The flowers appear to be made from piped buttercream or whipped cream, with large white rosettes interspersed among smaller, colorful blossoms. This cake would be suitable for celebratory occasions and is visually striking, likely to attract attention in an urban bakery or outdoor event.
description: A round, single-tier cake with white icing and vibrant pink, magenta, and purple floral decorations around the top edge. The cake features a ruffled pink border at the base and a smooth, ridged side finish.
description_view_0: The cake is shown with a clear view of the floral decorations, highlighting the white rosettes and pink, magenta, and purple piped flowers along the top edge.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the large white rosettes and the even distribution of colorful flowers, with the ruffled pink border at the base clearly visible.
description_view_2: The cake's floral ring appears dense and vibrant, with the white icing base and ridged sides prominent in this view.
description_view_3: The floral decorations are seen wrapping around the cake, with the pink ruffled base border and smooth white icing side in focus.
